name: Steak-Vegetable Pockets
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Beef top round steak, boneless steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Thinly slice the beef into bite-size strips.
2. Spray a wok or large skillet with nonstick spray to coat.
3. Heat the wok or skillet over high heat.
4. Add broccoli, carrot, onion, and green pepper; stir-fry for 7 minutes.
5. Add pea pods, mushrooms, and tomato; stir-fry for 2 minutes.
6. Remove vegetables from the wok or skillet.
7. Add cooking oil; heat over high heat.
8. Stir-fry beef in hot oil for 3 minutes.
9. Combine 1/4 cup cold water and soy sauce in a bowl. Mix in cornstarch until blended.
10. Add the mixture to the wok or skillet.
11. Cook and stir until bubbly.
12. Return vegetables to the wok; heat through.
13. Spoon the mixture into halved pita bread rounds.
